# Simple sloped terrain - uphill in +X direction
# X Y Z format (meters)
# Terrain rises from 0m to 200m over 1000m horizontal distance
# This creates an approximate 11.3 degree slope (tan = 0.2)
0.0 0.0 0.0
0.0 250.0 0.0
0.0 500.0 0.0
0.0 750.0 0.0
0.0 1000.0 0.0
250.0 0.0 50.0
250.0 250.0 50.0
250.0 500.0 50.0
250.0 750.0 50.0
250.0 1000.0 50.0
500.0 0.0 100.0
500.0 250.0 100.0
500.0 500.0 100.0
500.0 750.0 100.0
500.0 1000.0 100.0
750.0 0.0 150.0
750.0 250.0 150.0
750.0 500.0 150.0
750.0 750.0 150.0
750.0 1000.0 150.0
1000.0 0.0 200.0
1000.0 250.0 200.0
1000.0 500.0 200.0
1000.0 750.0 200.0
1000.0 1000.0 200.0
